notes:
Cut Valet 1.0 — the first public release.

- Setup, radically simplified: one question (Files only / Everyday / Power) configures the whole AI stack, with an optional backup location step and API key row. Setup opens instantly.
- Clip descriptions up to 3× faster on the Fast tier, and you can now pick any model size per tier (2B–32B) with live download progress. Fixed a deadlock that could silently freeze all AI analysis.
- Ingest you can trust: three clear progress bars (copying / backing up / placing in Resolve) with real counts and a green "safe to close" state. Resolve placement no longer slows down as big cards fill the bin.
- Find a song: new "Describe the vibe (AI)" search — write what the scene feels like and it blends mood/genre/tempo results, fully locally.
- YouTube upload polish (progress, scheduling calendar, draft round-trip) and scene-grouping fixes.
- Windows: new signed per-user installer alongside the zip.
